title: Shipwrecked: Nightmare at Sea
shortSynopsis: Never-before-seen footage and survivor accounts trace the 2012 shipwreck of a luxury cruise and the disaster that ensued, in this immersive documentary.

title: Voicemails for Isabelle
shortSynopsis: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.

title: Enola Holmes 3
shortSynopsis: Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.

title: Regretting You
shortSynopsis: Morgan's life is shattered when her husband and sister die in a car crash. But when she learns they were having an affair, she must find a way to heal.

title: Meg 2: The Trench
shortSynopsis: In the ocean's darkest depths, researchers fight for survival against monstrous sea creatures and an equally predatory mining operation.

title: KPop Demon Hunters
shortSynopsis: When K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey aren't selling out stadiums, they're using their secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats.

title: Death on the Nile
shortSynopsis: Detective Hercule Poirot investigates the murder of a young heiress aboard a glamorous river steamer in this star-studded adaptation of Agatha Christie.

title: The Boss Baby
shortSynopsis: A kid finds himself at the center of a corporate plot thanks to his new baby brother — who only talks business when their parents aren't around.

title: Joy Ride
shortSynopsis: A college student's cross-country trip switches gears from funny to frightening after he and his big brother prank a vengeful trucker.

title: Sniper: No Nation
shortSynopsis: After their nation brands them enemies of the state, a sniper and his father must rescue fellow soldiers while evading the mercenaries who hunt them.

title: Desire
shortSynopsis: When a married lawyer starts an affair with her daughter's swim coach, a torrid romance turns into a twisted game where everyone loses control.

title: Nothing to Lose
shortSynopsis: She gave everything to become a mother, so when her young son falls ill, Jada will stop at nothing to find a donor and save him — no matter the cost.

title: Ikka
shortSynopsis: With a loved one's life at stake, a celebrated lawyer must defend a man he suspects is guilty — battling his conscience every step of the way.

title: 23 000 Lives
shortSynopsis: A group of young people sets sail for the Mediterranean to save the lives of refugees — a mission that puts their ideas of law and justice to the test.

title: Pati Patni Aur Woh Do
shortSynopsis: A man helps a friend by posing as her lover while trying to keep it a secret from his wife — leading to misunderstandings that threaten his marriage.

title: Wonderful Nightmare
shortSynopsis: A relentless attorney dies after heaven makes a mistake, and the only way she can get back to her old life is by living as a stranger's wife for a month.

title: Susana and Elvira: No Plan B
shortSynopsis: After a fallout abroad, two former best friends reluctantly reunite to plan a high-profile wedding for the hottest artists in town — with no backup plan.

title: The Marked Woman
shortSynopsis: When a woman is found in a shipping container with no memory of who she is, two detectives race to figure out her identity — and who wants her dead.

title: Peddi
shortSynopsis: In a village that doesn't officially exist, a laborer's unmatched athletic talent becomes his weapon to fight for his people's right to be recognized.

title: Colors Of Evil: Black
shortSynopsis: When a young boy goes missing in a small sleepy town, a newly reassigned prosecutor begins to uncover unexpected links to an old missing persons case.

title: Little House on the Prairie: Season 1
shortSynopsis: The close-knit Ingalls family builds a new life on the Western frontier, where the joys of nature and the struggle for survival are deeply intertwined.

title: I Will Find You: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: Wrongfully imprisoned for murdering his own son, a father sets out on a desperate rescue mission after learning the boy may still be alive.

title: The Hawk: Season 1
shortSynopsis: On the back nine of his career, golf legend Lonnie "The Hawk" Hawkins chases one final major — and drags everyone he loves into the chaos.

title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Season 2
shortSynopsis: To end the war, Aang must master earthbending — but in the Earth Kingdom, politics, secrets and hidden alliances are a battlefield of their own.

title: Worst Neighbor Ever: Season 1
shortSynopsis: This intense documentary series details true stories of neighbors gone bad, from heinous fraud schemes to senseless acts of violent retribution.

title: Raw: 2026 - July 13, 2026
shortSynopsis: World Heavyweight Champion Roman Reigns appears in Dallas. Seven Superstars compete in an Intercontinental Title No. 1 Contender's Gauntlet Match.

title: Salish & Jordan Matter: Season 2
shortSynopsis: Join Salish and Jordan for another season of out-there challenges, extreme pranks and special guests in this mix of some of their most popular videos.

title: The Ultimatum: Marry or Move On: Season 4
shortSynopsis: Walk down the aisle or walk away forever? Six couples put love on the line and learn if they're ready to wed after spending a month with a new partner.

title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Season 1
shortSynopsis: A young boy known as the Avatar must master the four elemental powers to save a world at war — and fight a ruthless enemy bent on stopping him.

title: Sullivan's Crossing: Season 4
shortSynopsis: As Maggie opens a new chapter at the Crossing, her past and present collide, threatening her relationship and the future she's worked to build.

title: Agent Kim Reactivated: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: When an unassuming dad's daughter goes missing, he dusts off his old black-ops skills to track her down — only to attract the wrong kind of attention.

title: The East Palace: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: A man who walks the spirit world and a court lady who hears the dead enter the East Palace by the king's orders — can they unravel its dark secrets?

title: I'm Not Afraid: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: When a 10-year-old boy stumbles upon a terrifying sight, he'll learn the brutal realities of life, survival and desperation of a town on the edge.

title: José Totoy 3
shortSynopsis: José and his friends go on a magical journey of learning full of fun surprises, adventures in nature and even space travel!

title: The Apartment Job: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: Desperate for cash, a former gang boss teams up with an aspiring lawyer to steal an apartment complex's reserve fund — only to uncover deep corruption.

title: Teach You a Lesson: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: When respect collapses in schools, unconventional inspectors arrive to set things right — with sharp, no-nonsense lessons you won't find in textbooks.

title: The Polygamist: Season 1
shortSynopsis: Social media darling, Joyce, is the picture of marital perfection — until her cheating husband's conquests ignite a scandalous emotional meltdown.

title: Spooky in Love: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: When a ghost-seeing heir and an ace prosecutor learn that a single touch makes them a strangely effective duo, they team up to crack unsolved murders.

title: Human Vapor: Season 1
shortSynopsis: A death on live TV. A culprit who turns to gas. Behind it, a secret project that used and discarded the vulnerable. One detective pursues the dark truth.

title: The Map of Longing: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: Before her death, Lucy creates a game for her sister, Greta, pushing her into a journey of self-discovery — and toward the charming Will Tucker.
